name: Ambrosia Fruit & Nut Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the Jell-O in boiling water according to package instructions. Set aside to cool slightly.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the sour cream and remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased mold and refrigerate for one hour.
4. When ready to serve, place the mold in a pan of warm water briefly to loosen the gelatin. Turn out onto a serving dish.
